testcase.name: Verify the Discover feature › Verify that FE send correct data on their API based on selected filters and its data reponse returned correctly

failure.message: discover.spec.ts:121:9 Verify that FE send correct data on their API based on selected filters and its data reponse returned correctly

testcase.failure:
[chromium] › scripts/discover.spec.ts:121:9 › Verify the Discover feature › Verify that FE send correct data on their API based on selected filters and its data reponse returned correctly
Error: expect(received).toEqual(expected) // deep equality
Expected: "2025-12-31" Received: "2026-12-31"
at pages/discoverpage.ts:131
129 | expect.soft(url.searchParams.get("sort_by")).toEqual(params.sort_by); 130 | expect.soft(url.searchParams.get("release_date.gte")).toEqual(params['release_date.gte']); > 131 | expect.soft(url.searchParams.get("release_date.lte")).toEqual(params['release_date.lte']); | ^ 132 | expect.soft(url.searchParams.get("vote_average.gte")).toEqual(params['vote_average.gte']); 133 | expect.soft(url.searchParams.get("vote_average.lte")).toEqual(params['vote_average.lte']); 134 | expect.soft(url.searchParams.get("page")).toEqual(params.page); at DiscoverPage.verifyTheParams (/Users/huynh.hoan/interview-project/tests/pages/discoverpage.ts:131:63) at /Users/huynh.hoan/interview-project/tests/scripts/discover.spec.ts:171:28

testcase.system-out:
[INFO][03-18-2026 11:37:10]: selecting category:Popular [INFO][03-18-2026 11:37:10]: Starting filter movie with the criteria: { "category": "Popular", "type": "TV Shows", "genre": [ "Animation", "Comedy" ], "yearFrom": "2025", "yearTo": "2025", "rating": 3 } [INFO][03-18-2026 11:37:11]: Verifying the below params: { "sort_by": "popularity.desc", "release_date.gte": "2025-01-01", "release_date.lte": "2025-12-31", "vote_average.gte": "3", "vote_average.lte": "5", "page": "1", "with_genres": "16,35", "api_key": "add494e96808c55b3ee7f940c9d5e5b6" } [INFO][03-18-2026 11:37:11]: Verifying the below response: { "page": 1, "results": [ { "adult": false, "backdrop_path": "/tVsrQ1nu3k0Y5H999bcpTCnf9LT.jpg", "genre_ids": [ 16, 35 ], "id": 46938, "origin_country": [ "RU" ], "original_language": "ru", "original_name": "Лунтик и его друзья", "overview": ""The Adventures of Luntik" or simply "Luntik" is a Russian animated series for children of preschool age. It is the story of a small fluffy creature, Luntik, who was born on the Moon and fell from it, on to the Earth. Luntik is the main character and each episode features a story about him and his friends. Luntik is new to the Earth and in each episode he learns something about this new world. He meets new friends, learns how to be polite and even gets a family. The majority of the characters in the series are small animals: insects, fish, frogs, bees, grasshoppers, ladybugs etc. The show features both adult and children characters. The series are shown from the child's perspective and the stories are very kind and warm. Even the "villains" of the series - two caterpillars - are just a couple of mischievous kids. Each episode is only 6 minutes long and has a finished story line.", "popularity": 30.1434, "poster_path": "/ikDr9Ua8dglQczEDqzNvnOVyIBL.jpg", "first_air_date": "2006-09-01", "name": "Moonzy", "vote_average": 4.5, "vote_count": 13 }, { "adult": false, "backdrop_path": "/cyH8Ni1OSMtBbloEmI9eE69Xi7j.jpg", "genre_ids": [ 35, 16, 10765, 10751 ], "id": 47035, "origin_country": [ "US" ], "original_language": "en", "original_name": "Uncle Grandpa", "overview": "The adventures of Uncle Grandpa who is out to help every child and adult in the world through the power of imagination. With his mystical R.V. and eternal optimism, Uncle Grandpa is always ready to greet the day - and everyone he meets - with his signature, "Good Mornin'."", "popularity": 28.4761, "poster_path": "/zLVOgigPMsd2hkwmcY5AqNhqgcn.jpg", "first_air_date": "2013-09-02", "name": "Uncle Grandpa", "vote_average": 4.5, "vote_count": 113 }, { "adult": false, "backdrop_path": "/qF1KzXiGJ4gX3ICgd0WKJk7EMY.jpg", "genre_ids": [ 16, 35 ], "id": 44663, "origin_country": [ "JP" ], "original_language": "ja", "original_name": "いなかっぺ大将", "overview": "", "popularity": 19.6867, "poster_path": "/9ZUvy3OKCPpS7EJNtKUIPMRcGFq.jpg", "first_air_date": "1970-10-04", "name": "General Inakappe", "vote_average": 3.5, "vote_count": 2 }, { "adult": false, "backdrop_path": "/u28izLFeMVNQhe5cxdubcS7ztjB.jpg", "genre_ids": [ 16, 10762, 10759, 10765, 35, 10751 ], "id": 243216, "origin_country": [ "JP" ], "original_language": "ja", "original_name": "わんだふるぷりきゅあ！", "overview": "In Animal Town where humans and animals live together, Iroha who loves animals is very close to her dog Komugi! One day, a mysterious creature called a GaruGaru goes berserk in her city. In order to protect Iroha, Komugi transforms into a human and even a Pretty Cure…!? We have to protect such berserk animals! Let's join forces and return the animals to the Niko Garden!", "popularity": 19.1116, "poster_path": "/2PhiNPB0UyqBu9pHm0cluD0Sh3W.jpg", "first_air_date": "2024-02-04", "name": "Wonderful Precure!", "vote_average": 4, "vote_count": 7 }, { "adult": false, "backdrop_path": "/dGjFqV1QfXSP9P5qe6UATnD6ss0.jpg", "genre_ids": [ 16, 35 ], "id": 42565, "origin_country": [ "JP" ], "original_language": "ja", "original_name": "天使な小生意気", "overview": "Cheeky Angel is a comedy romance action manga series by Hiroyuki Nishimori. The story revolves around the adventures of 15-year-old schoolgirl Megumi Amatsuka, a popular and beautiful tomboy that always get into fights with a secret: she used to be a boy. Originally a serial in Shōnen Sunday, it has been collected in 20 tankōbon volumes and adapted as a 50-episode anime series. In 2001, the manga won the Shogakukan Manga Award for shōnen.", "popularity": 17.6845, "poster_path": "/hKRwRjnfwe9vC6IsRQ36LaJAo02.jpg", "first_air_date": "2002-04-07", "name": "Cheeky Angel", learn valuable skills needed to become Jedi along the way.", "popularity": 15.5213, "poster_path": "/bC2Mix1WPUiY6pldh77oiFl1MvI.jpg", "first_air_date": "2023-05-04", "name": "Star Wars: Young Jedi "original_language": "ja", "original_name": "キン肉マン 完璧超人始祖編", "overview": "Kinnikuman returns to the ring in an epic three-way battle between the Seigi, Akuma and Perfect Chojin factions and reveals the roots of the Chojin.", "popularity": 13.8839, "poster_path": "/tkhMzWi33pPpyxJDwAs3xiqLiGA.jpg", "first_air_date": "2024-07-14", "name": "Kinnikuman Perfect Origin Arc", "vote_average": 5, "vote_count": 8 }, { "adult": false, "backdrop_path": "/h8TPjQM9r6PYgZ2GnkgLKW7eb75.jpg", "genre_ids": [ 16, 10759, 35 ], "id": 92989, "origin_country": [ "JP" ], "original_language": "ja", "original_name": "さすがの猿飛", "overview": "Nikumaru, meaning meatball in Japanese, is a seventeen-year-old student at Ninja High School, a special school for the training of ninja. He is short and chubby, but he possesses a super technique known as the "kamikaze", where he stirs up a whirlwind with his feet. The series introduces his many adventures and pranks as Nikumaru meets with his rivals both in and out of school.", "popularity": 15.4058, "poster_path": "/uwDPBq1e1oHUDFILcfwOMWDB8um.jpg", "first_air_date": "1982-10-17", "name": "Amazing Sarutobi", "vote_average": 4.7, "vote_count": 3 }, { "adult": false, "backdrop_path": "/dlOkqakV9AKFFUS6Sxn64VS5ffp.jpg", "genre_ids": [ 16, 35, 80, 9648 ], "id": 126725, "origin_country": [ "US" ], "original_language": "en", "original_name": "Velma", "overview": "Jinkies! This raucous reimagining of the Scooby-Doo franchise unravels the mysterious origins of Mystery, Inc. – as seen through the eyes of the gang’s beloved bespectacled detective Velma.", "popularity": 13.8855, "poster_path": "/zxkNhuPSHeDv3yA7sFu2RuEOGgR.jpg", "first_air_date": "2023-01-12", "name": "Velma", "vote_average": 3.4, "vote_count": 329 }, { "adult": false, "backdrop_path": "/f2PzX6WjS3e9wTizrNBHwBodmvn.jpg", "genre_ids": [ 10751, 16, 35, 10762 ], "id": 74916, "origin_country": [ "US", "GB" ], "original_language": "en", "original_name": "Wacky Races", "overview": "Wacky Races (2017) is a reboot of the classic 1968 Hanna-Barbera animated series, bringing a fresh, modern take on the original premise while retaining much of the core essence that made the original show so beloved. The 2017 version, created by Warner Bros. Animation, aired on the Boomerang network and introduced a new generation to the zany, high-speed races of the characters.

In this updated series, the characters from the original Wacky Races return, but with a more contemporary style and new backstories. The vehicles are also revamped with more advanced technology and a few new additions to the roster, though the classic ones like Dick Dastardly’s Mean Machine and Penelope Pitstop’s Compact Pussycat are still present.", "popularity": 15.5099, "poster_path": "/rgmUxN8vPB4WvvWKEhEpWs8SR9D.jpg", "first_air_date": "2017-08-14", "name": "Wacky Races", "vote_average": 4.6, "vote_count": 11 }, { "adult": false, "backdrop_path": "/5oWxlHVfhStOtX4VZJ2b552JYTp.jpg", "genre_ids": [ 35, 16 ], "id": 71012, "origin_country": [ "JP" ], "original_language": "ja", "original_name": "アイドルマスター シンデレラガールズ劇場", "overview": "", "popularity": 17.1409, "poster_path": "/3OueDlWvmzhWa7BRxC2bLuwkFqc.jpg", "first_air_date": "2017-04-04", "name": "Cinderella Girls Theatre", "vote_average": 4.6, "vote_count": 8 }, { "adult": false, "backdrop_path": "/teSk8sm8o7wZjLZUFSKmc1IVdwh.jpg", "genre_ids": [ 35, 16 ], "id": 62853, "origin_country": [ "US" ], "original_language": "en", "original_name": "Pickle & Peanut", "overview": "A buddy comedy series about two unlikely friends — an emotional pickle and a freewheeling peanut.", "popularity": 12.6067, "poster_path": "/eifTkh6JbmEaUTbIm2jaKWr18UQ.jpg", "first_air_date": "2015-09-02", "name": "Pickle & Peanut", "vote_average": 4.8, "vote_count": 13 }, { "adult": false, "backdrop_path": "/e2hh2OEqKG6FegxIuRTYY61hIhA.jpg", "genre_ids": [ 16, 10759, 35, 80, 10762, 9648 ], "id": 10518, "origin_country": [ "US" ], "original_language": "en", "original_name": "Clue Club", "overview": "Clue Club is a 30-minute Saturday morning animated series produced by Hanna-Barbera Productions from August 14, 1976 to September 3, 1977 on CBS.

Clue Club only had one season’s worth of first-run episodes produced, which were shown on Saturday mornings on CBS.

In the fall of 1977, cut-down versions of the half-hour episodes of Clue Club appeared under the new title Woofer & Wimper, Dog Detectives to showcase the show's basset and bloodhound which aired as a segment on the CBS Saturday morning package program The Skatebirds from September 10, 1977 to January 28, 1978.

When The Skatebirds was cancelled in early 1978, Woofer & Wimper, Dog Detectives re-appeared as a segment alongside The Robonic Stooges on their half-hour show, also on CBS. The full-length versions of Clue Club returned to CBS on Sunday mornings from September 1978 to September 1979, concluding the show’s original network run.

After a mid-1980s revival on USA Cartoon Express, it has since resurfaced on Cartoon Network and Boomerang.", "popularity": 14.4044, "poster_path": "/mvmHo3nvO1JTRyxnTcQQj5ru9Wr.jpg", "first_air_date": "1976-08-14", "name": "Clue Club", "vote_average": 4.8, "vote_count": 5 }, { "adult": false, "backdrop_path": "/a1q4poXtZvd22sZhfiYFkhWetMx.jpg", "genre_ids": [ 16, 9648, 35 ], "id": 87447, "origin_country": [ "JP" ], "original_language": "ja", "original_name": "歌舞伎町シャーロック", "overview": "Shinjuku Ward, east side… The center of the street with the most chaos, there's Kabuki-chō, full of neon lights. When the light is stronger, the shadow is deeper. The story begins when certain bizarre murder happens one night! Suspense? Or Comedy? Drama that cannot be identified begins!", "popularity": 10.806, "poster_path": "/a3IN3jazd0GtDjSPuPuf9WTqR56.jpg", "first_air_date": "2019-10-10", "name": "Case File N° 221: Kabukicho", "vote_average": 5, "vote_count": 20 }, { "adult": false, "backdrop_path": "/sBOkXcbG6dIRlUp1UspwsdzGZsi.jpg", "genre_ids": [ 16, 10762, 10751, 35 ], "id": 88069, "origin_country": [ "CA" ], toddlers.", "popularity": 13.8517, "poster_path": "/A9KAegh5542L8JktkwsZZrdekhe.jpg", "first_air_date": "2018-09-01", "name": "Total DramaRama", "vote_average": 4.967, "vote_count": 30 }, { "adult": false, "backdrop_path": "/gh16eOVFRX0c2Br9mIr2KnxygFR.jpg", "genre_ids": [ 16, 35, 10759, 10762 ], "id": 18848, "origin_country": [ "US" ], "original_language": "en", "original_name": "Planet Sheen", 1989-1992 animated television series produced by DIC Entertainment, with comedian John Candy providing the voice for an animated version of himself.", "popularity": 9.6447, "poster_path": "/A3i4GRWCvw2PAyu41uokAOvekSt.jpg", "first_air_date": "1989-09-09", "name": "Camp Candy", "vote_average": 5, "vote_count": 5 }, { "adult": false, "backdrop_path": "/hqYwmjCnzXwLlEk0O2psygJQYsi.jpg", "genre_ids": [ 16, 35 ], "id": 279120, "origin_country": [ "JP" ], "original_language": "ja", "original_name": "「１分間だけ触れてもいいよ…」シェアハウスの秘密ルール。", "overview": "After entering university, Ryota moves into a share house where he meets two stunningly beautiful sharemates, Momoka and Kanade. As the three of them begin to cohabitate together, they agree on one "secret rule." "If it's just for a minute, you can touch whatever you want." Thus begins Ryota's new life at the share house, where sweet temptation lies behind every door...!", "popularity": 12.0348, "poster_path": "/chmCJiUJqhOpBKfJi88Rw2iB8IT.jpg", "first_air_date": "2025-01-06", "name": "The Share House's Secret Rule", "vote_average": 4, "vote_count": 1 }, { "adult": false, "backdrop_path": "/jPlwOnhAHeSLoHyYGGI56Cbca6T.jpg", "genre_ids": [ 18, 16, 10765, 35 ], "id": 42442, "origin_country": [ "JP" ], "original_language": "ja", "original_name": "まぶらほ", "overview": "High school student Kazuki Shikimori comes from a line of powerful magicians with extraordinary DNA and he attends the most prestigious school for wizards in all of Japan. It would seem that life is good for Kazuki. Unfortunately, that couldn’t be further from the truth. He’s not the most smooth when it comes to the ladies, his grades are poor, his athletic skill is next to none, and to top it all off, he can only use his magic eight times before he turns into dust! However, three magical hotties have learned of his genetic secret and are all after him! Suddenly he has become the most “popular” kid in class. Are all these girls out to romance him, or are they only after his DNA?", "popularity": 12.7665, "poster_path": "/hDV2FsIjNrKgAXe7GKis1eqKp6Z.jpg", "first_air_date": "2003-10-14", "name": "Maburaho", "vote_average": 4.9, "vote_count": 11 } ], "total_pages": 18, "total_results": 348 }
